summary: Comprehensive BioLens testing completed - all 4 core features working perfectly. Search functionality with search_biolens_scan_enriched() works, autocomplete dropdown uses position:fixed with z-index:9999 preventing click interception, Purchase Impact section renders correctly for both petro-based (4 stats) and plant-based materials (no microplastic stat), PWA manifest and service worker accessible, Share functionality works, scan history functional, no console errors detected.
passed_tests: Search for 'polyester hoodie' works with search_biolens_scan_enriched() - correctly returns Polyester, Petro-Based, High risk
Autocomplete dropdown appears when typing 'poly' with correct position:fixed and z-index:9999
Autocomplete suggestion click navigates to results (click interception bug is fixed)
Autocomplete keyboard navigation (ArrowDown + Enter) works perfectly
Typing full query + Enter bypasses dropdown and runs search
Purchase Impact section renders for petro-based materials with 4 stats (Petro cost, Jobs multiplier, Carbon savings, Microplastic shedding)
Purchase Impact section renders for plant-based materials without microplastic stat (Hemp correctly shows no petro cost or microplastic stats)
Petroload meter displays correctly (95/100 Very High for polyester)
Share button opens share card modal successfully
PWA manifest.json accessible at /manifest.json with correct app metadata
Backend 100% pass rate - all API endpoints working (search, materials, barcode lookup)
Backend barcode lookup returns title, brand, description, source correctly
Scan history works - search results saved and navigation from history cards functional
Navigation to Explore Materials page works
No console errors detected on any page
'Already a great material choice' section appears for sustainable materials like Hemp
